home.title: The Future of
home.subtitle: Decentralized Payroll
home.description: Experience seamless, continuous streaming payments built on Stellar. Manage your treasury automatically with AI-driven compliance. Empower your workforce with real-time capital access.
home.why_choose_desc: Built for the future of work, powered by cutting-edge blockchain technology
home.feature_1_desc: Money flows fluidly into wallets, eliminating the painful wait for payday. Watch earnings grow by the second.
home.feature_2_desc: Fully transparent smart contract vaults powered by Soroban. Self-custody with zero counterparty risk.
home.feature_3_desc: Autonomous AI handles stream calculations, dynamic pause rules, and real-time solvency checks.

dashboard.title: Employer Dashboard
dashboard.loading_description: Loading your Quipay dashboard metrics and active stream overview.
dashboard.seo_description: Track {{activeStreamsCount}} active streams with total liabilities {{totalLiabilities}} in your Quipay employer dashboard.
dashboard.projected_pay: You are projected to pay {{totalLiabilities}} in the next 30 days.
dashboard.no_funds_description: Your treasury is currently empty. Deposit funds to start paying your workers.
dashboard.no_streams_description: You haven't created any payment streams yet. Start by adding your first worker.
